# Getting Help

## Setup Issues

Type **"start setup"** in your AI editor's chat panel. The setup wizard handles everything step by step.

If the wizard fails, check:
- Is [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) installed? (`uv --version`)
- Is Modal CLI installed? (`modal --version`)
- Does `.env` exist with your endpoint URL?

## Questions & Troubleshooting

- **[GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/burakcanpolat/med-guide/discussions)** — Ask questions, share tips, show your use cases
- Type **"help"** in your AI editor for a quick command reference

## Bug Reports

- **[GitHub Issues](https://github.com/burakcanpolat/med-guide/issues)** — Use the bug report template
- Include: your editor (Zed/Cursor/Claude Code), OS, and any error output

## Security Issues

- **Do NOT open a public issue** for security vulnerabilities
- See [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for private reporting instructions
